zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida von Arnsberg於1108年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格時，她的父親Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg33歲，母親Adelheid van Limburg19歲。她於大約1126年與Godfried I van Cuijk在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1154年在荷蘭努-布拉班特可享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida von Arnsberg于1108年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格时，她的父亲Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg33岁，母亲Adelheid van Limburg19岁。她于大约1126年与Godfried I van Cuijk在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1154年在荷兰努-布拉班特可享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnsberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Swedish (of German origin): habitational name from a place called as ‘eagle's mountain’ (see   Arend   and   Berg  ), probably Ahrensberg in Mecklenburg. Compare   Darensbourg  .

variants.name: Arend
meanings: German: from the personal name Arend of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements arn ‘eagle’ + wald ‘rule’.

variants.name: Darensbourg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Aurore, Camile, Pierre.

Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of German Arensberg . It is formed with the French preposition de ‘from’, spelled d' before a vowel. This surname is found mainly among African Americans.

History: The progenitor of many of the Darensbourgs was Karl Friedrich Arensberg, a German born in Stettin in Pomerania (today Szczecin in Poland), who arrived in LA in 1721. By 1724, Darensbourg, as he came to be known, was de facto leader of the German colony in LA.

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida von Arnsberg was born in 1108, in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg, was 33 and her mother, Adelheid van Limburg, was 19. She married Godfried I van Cuijk about 1126, in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1154, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida von Arnsberg est née en 1108, à Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Adelheid van Limburg, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Godfried I van Cuijk environ 1126, à Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1154, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida von Arnsberg 1108 in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg 33 und ihre Mutter Adelheid van Limburg 19. Sie hat um 1126 in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Godfried I van Cuijk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1154 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Arnsberg è nata il nel 1108 nel Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Adelheid van Limburg, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Godfried I van Cuijk circa 1126, nel Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1154, nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida von Arnsbergが1108年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスアルンスバーグで生まれた時，父Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsbergは33歳，母Adelheid van Limburgは19歳であった。約1126年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスアルンスバーグでGodfried I van Cuijkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1154年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida von Arnsberg(이)가 1108년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 아른스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid van Limburg(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1126년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 아른스버그에서 Godfried I van Cuijk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1154년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 c이j크에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida von Arnsberg nasceu em 1108, em Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid van Limburg, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Godfried I van Cuijk aproximadamente 1126, em Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1154, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida von Arnsberg родилась в 1108 г. в местности арнсбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid van Limburg, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfried I van Cuijk около 1126 г. в местности арнсбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1154 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 46 лет.

es.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida von Arnsberg nació en 1108, en Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Adelheid van Limburg, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Godfried I van Cuijk aproximadamente 1126, en Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1154, en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 46 años.
